name: highergraphen-cli-skill-bundle
description: Provider-neutral package for the current HigherGraphen CLI and skill integration surface.

entrypoints.cargo_command: cargo run -q -p highergraphen-cli -- architecture smoke direct-db-access --format json
entrypoints.casegraphen_workflow_cargo_command: cargo run -q -p casegraphen -- workflow reason --input schemas/casegraphen/workflow.graph.example.json --format json
casegraphen_workflow_focused_commands: casegraphen workflow history topology --input workflow.graph.json --format json
casegraphen workflow history topology diff --left left.workflow.json --right right.workflow.json --format json
casegraphen workflow project --input workflow.graph.json --projection projection.json --format json
casegraphen workflow correspond --left left.workflow.json --right right.workflow.json --format json
casegraphen_cg_workflow_bridge_commands: casegraphen cg workflow import --store casegraphen-workflow-store --input workflow.graph.json --revision-id revision:initial --format json
casegraphen cg workflow list --store casegraphen-workflow-store --format json
casegraphen cg workflow inspect --store casegraphen-workflow-store --workflow-graph-id workflow_graph:id --format json
casegraphen cg workflow history --store casegraphen-workflow-store --workflow-graph-id workflow_graph:id --format json
casegraphen cg workflow history topology --store casegraphen-workflow-store --workflow-graph-id workflow_graph:id --format json
casegraphen cg workflow replay --store casegraphen-workflow-store --workflow-graph-id workflow_graph:id --format json
casegraphen cg workflow validate --store casegraphen-workflow-store --workflow-graph-id workflow_graph:id --format json
casegraphen cg workflow readiness --store casegraphen-workflow-store --workflow-graph-id workflow_graph:id --format json

casegraphen cg workflow completion accept --store casegraphen-workflow-store --workflow-graph-id workflow_graph:id --candidate-id candidate:id --reviewer-id reviewer:id --reason reason --revision-id revision:id --format json

casegraphen cg workflow completion reject --store casegraphen-workflow-store --workflow-graph-id workflow_graph:id --candidate-id candidate:id --reviewer-id reviewer:id --reason reason --revision-id revision:id --format json

casegraphen cg workflow completion reopen --store casegraphen-workflow-store --workflow-graph-id workflow_graph:id --candidate-id candidate:id --reviewer-id reviewer:id --reason reason --revision-id revision:id --format json

casegraphen cg workflow completion patch --store casegraphen-workflow-store --workflow-graph-id workflow_graph:id --candidate-id candidate:id --reviewer-id reviewer:id --reason reason --revision-id revision:id --format json
casegraphen cg workflow patch check --store casegraphen-workflow-store --workflow-graph-id workflow_graph:id --transition-id transition:id --format json

casegraphen cg workflow patch apply --store casegraphen-workflow-store --workflow-graph-id workflow_graph:id --transition-id transition:id --reviewer-id reviewer:id --reason reason --revision-id revision:id --format json

casegraphen cg workflow patch reject --store casegraphen-workflow-store --workflow-graph-id workflow_graph:id --transition-id transition:id --reviewer-id reviewer:id --reason reason --revision-id revision:id --format json
casegraphen_native_case_commands: casegraphen case new --store casegraphen-native-store --case-space-id case_space:id --space-id space:id --title title --revision-id revision:id --format json
casegraphen case import --store casegraphen-native-store --input native.case.space.json --revision-id revision:id --format json
casegraphen case inspect --store casegraphen-native-store --case-space-id case_space:id --format json
casegraphen case history --store casegraphen-native-store --case-space-id case_space:id --format json
casegraphen case history topology --store casegraphen-native-store --case-space-id case_space:id --format json
casegraphen case history topology diff --left-store casegraphen-native-left --left-case-space-id case_space:id --right-store casegraphen-native-right --right-case-space-id case_space:id --format json
casegraphen case replay --store casegraphen-native-store --case-space-id case_space:id --format json
casegraphen case validate --store casegraphen-native-store --case-space-id case_space:id --format json
casegraphen case reason --store casegraphen-native-store --case-space-id case_space:id --format json
casegraphen case frontier --store casegraphen-native-store --case-space-id case_space:id --format json
casegraphen case obstructions --store casegraphen-native-store --case-space-id case_space:id --format json
casegraphen case completions --store casegraphen-native-store --case-space-id case_space:id --format json
casegraphen case evidence --store casegraphen-native-store --case-space-id case_space:id --format json
casegraphen case project --store casegraphen-native-store --case-space-id case_space:id --format json
casegraphen case close-check --store casegraphen-native-store --case-space-id case_space:id --base-revision-id revision:id --validation-evidence-id evidence:id --format json
casegraphen_native_morphism_commands: casegraphen morphism propose --store casegraphen-native-store --case-space-id case_space:id --input case_morphism.json --format json
casegraphen morphism check --store casegraphen-native-store --case-space-id case_space:id --morphism-id morphism:id --format json

casegraphen morphism apply --store casegraphen-native-store --case-space-id case_space:id --morphism-id morphism:id --base-revision-id revision:id --reviewer-id reviewer:id --reason reason --format json
casegraphen morphism reject --store casegraphen-native-store --case-space-id case_space:id --morphism-id morphism:id --reviewer-id reviewer:id --reason reason --revision-id revision:id --format json
